summary: Iteration 141: Testing new Accounting module pages - Financial Dashboard, Balance Sheet, Journal Entries, Landing Page. Fixed 1 backend bug. All 17 backend tests pass, all frontend pages verified.

fixed.issue: AttributeError on current_user.get() - Pydantic model accessed as dict at line 555
fixed.fix: Changed current_user.get() to getattr(current_user, ...) in accounting.py line 555

critical_code_review_comments: Landing Page: Fully public (no auth), hero section with CTA, 6 feature cards, 5 module cards, 3 pricing plans (Starter/Business/Enterprise), footer with copyright. All navigation buttons work.

Financial Dashboard: 5 metric cards (Cash Inflow, Cash Outflow, Net Cash Flow, Receivable, Payable), Revenue vs Expenses chart (6 months), Net Profit Trend bar chart, Expense Breakdown pie chart, Payment Method breakdown, Monthly Summary table.

Balance Sheet: Date picker, Branch filter, 3 summary cards (Total Assets, Total Liabilities, Total Equity), Assets section (Cash on Hand, Bank Accounts, AR, Inventory), Liabilities (AP, Supplier Credits, VAT Payable), Equity (Retained Earnings), Accounting Equation at bottom.

Journal Entries: New Entry button, form with date/reference/type/description, line items with account selector/debit/credit, balance validation shows 'Entry is balanced' when debits=credits, Add Line button, Post Entry button.
Sidebar Accounting section: All 6 items present - Financial Dashboard, Chart of Accounts, Journal Entries, Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet, Tax & Currency.
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created and deleted test journal entries with prefix TEST_ITER141
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 141: Accounting module phase 2 complete. New pages tested: Landing Page (/landing - public), Financial Dashboard (/financial-dashboard), Balance Sheet (/balance-sheet), Journal Entries (/journal-entries). Bug fixed: accounting.py line 555 - same Pydantic model access pattern as iter140. All sidebar items for Accounting section verified. Recharts used for dashboard charts. Previous iter140 tested: Chart of Accounts, Bills, P&L, Tax Settings.

CTA section with email input - PASS

Revenue vs Expenses chart (6 months) - PASS
Net Profit Trend bar chart - PASS

Assets section (Cash on Hand, Bank Accounts, AR, Inventory) - PASS

features_verified.landing_page: Public landing page with hero, 6 features, 5 modules, 3 pricing plans, CTA, footer. Navigation to /login works.
features_verified.financial_dashboard: 5 metric cards, 4 chart sections (Revenue vs Expenses, Net Profit Trend, Expense Breakdown, Payment Method), Monthly Summary table
features_verified.balance_sheet: Date picker, branch filter, 3 summary cards, Assets/Liabilities/Equity sections, Accounting Equation, balance check indicator
features_verified.journal_entries: CRUD operations, balance validation (debit must equal credit), entry form with line items, delete functionality
features_verified.sidebar: Accounting section with 6 links (Financial Dashboard, Chart of Accounts, Journal Entries, Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet, Tax & Currency)
